description_long: This is a modern two-story cabin with a flat roof and a striking geometric design, featuring a mix of dark and light exterior panels. The front facade showcases a large vertical window section with a metallic or glass grid, adjacent to a wooden deck and a small pool or water feature. The left side includes a partially enclosed balcony on the upper floor and a series of large windows, while the right and rear sides are mostly solid with minimal fenestration. The structure sits on a raised platform, with steps leading up to the main entrance. The materials appear to be a combination of concrete, wood, glass, and metal, giving the cabin a contemporary urban feel. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of privacy with large transparent surfaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story cabin with large windows, a wooden deck, and a striking mix of dark and light exterior panels. Features include a prominent vertical window grid, a small pool, and a partially enclosed upper balcony.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large vertical window grid, wooden deck, and small pool feature.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the upper balcony, extensive window arrangement, and the continuation of the deck.
description_view_2: Rear view with a mostly solid wall, minimal windows, and a visible roof cutout.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a solid facade with little fenestration and the edge of the upper balcony.
attribute_roof_type: flat roof with a central cutout and minimal overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple large rectangular windows arranged asymmetrically, with a prominent vertical window grid on the front and a cluster of windows on the left side; minimal or no windows on the rear and right sides.
attribute_door_placement: Single main entrance door located on the front facade, offset to the right and adjacent to the large vertical window grid.
